hero.description: Senior Frontend Architect & Lead Developer with over {years} years of experience. I blend the craft of code with the power of AI to create exceptional interfaces.
about.paragraph1: With over {years} years in web development — from co-founding the Snowcap agency (30 clients, 10 employees) to Lead Frontend roles for startups like Mbrella and Elium — I've learned one thing: technology only matters when it serves people.
about.paragraph2: Today, I amplify this philosophy with Artificial Intelligence. Not to replace human creativity, but to multiply it.
about.highlight.copilot.title: AI Copilot
about.highlight.copilot.desc: I integrate the most advanced LLMs into my daily workflow: code generation, automated review, testing, documentation.
about.highlight.delivery.title: Accelerated Delivery
about.highlight.delivery.desc: AI allows me to drastically reduce development cycles while maintaining high quality standards.
about.highlight.design.title: Design Systems
about.highlight.design.desc: Design and implementation of scalable design systems, ensuring visual consistency and maintainability.
about.highlight.architecture.title: Frontend Architecture
about.highlight.architecture.desc: Structuring complex React applications, performance optimization, and establishing best practices.
experience.title: Experience
experience.mbrella.description: Building an HR platform for flexible mobility: personalized mobility plans, public transport management, mobility budgets. Large-scale React architecture in full remote.
experience.theglue.description: Creation of a 100% digital online lending platform, from application to signature. UX and performance focused.
experience.apex.description: Discord bot generating dynamic voice channels for the gaming community: trio matchmaking, names generated from game lore.
experience.tomorrowland.description: Responsive 3D interactive game to win Tomorrowland Winter tickets. Synchronized animations, immersive sound.
experience.elium.description: Frontend expertise on a large-scale Knowledge Management platform. Introduction of advanced responsive and UX patterns.
experience.emakina2.description: Evangelizing React.js within the agency. Team training and implementation of the first Electron + React project.
experience.jackmedia.description: Architecture of a next-generation messaging platform based on cloud micro-services and a universal language.
experience.snowcap.description: Creation and management of an open-source development agency. In 5 years: 30+ clients (Pairidaiza, Walibi, Eggo, Opéra de Liège...) and 10 employees. Focus on quality and startup support.
experience.emakina1.description: Leading a Drupal team: coaching, best practices, technical estimates. CMS development for major clients.
experience.symex.description: Development of real-time stock market feeds, financial portals, and a communication platform for the European Transparency Directive.

education.title: Education
contact.description: Looking for a Frontend Lead who can structure your React project, improve user experience, and integrate AI into your workflow? Let's talk.
